# Vendored libraries

| File | Library | Version | License | Upstream |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `marked.min.js` | marked | 13.0.0 | MIT | https://github.com/markedjs/marked |
| `prism-core.min.js` | PrismJS (core) | 1.29.0 | MIT | https://github.com/PrismJS/prism |
| `prism-langs.min.js` | PrismJS (json + yaml + bash + typescript + python) | 1.29.0 | MIT | https://github.com/PrismJS/prism |

Integrity: see `SHA256SUMS` (regenerate via `sha256sum *.js > SHA256SUMS` after any re-vendor).
